How It WorksPricing & What We TakeAboutImpactFAQsSchedule Pickup

🚨 Did You Know? Throwing electronics in the trash is illegal in Colorado due to their toxic materials 🚨

That’s where we come in.

Declutter your electronic waste, responsibly.

We come to your door, pick up your old, broken, or unwanted electronics, and make sure they’re recycled — not landfilled. For an affordable $25 flat fee that covers all your electronics and pickup, Juett Tech Rescue makes electronic recycling Easy and Convenient.

10% of profits from every pickup are donated to Basel Action Network (BAN), a nonprofit fighting illegal e-waste dumping and advocating for responsible electronics recycling worldwide.

THE PROCESS

How It Works & What You Get

No drop-offs. No hassle. We handle everything from your doorstep to responsible recycling.

1

Schedule Online

Fill out our simple form — tell us what you have and when works for you.

2

We Come to You

We show up at your Boulder address on your preferred day and collect your electronics — door to door.

3

Secure Wipe & Recycle

Your data is professionally wiped from any devices that store it, and everything is responsibly recycled through certified e-waste systems.

4

Get Paid / Give Back

We may pay you a portion of profits if any items are resold. A portion (10%) of profits from every pickup is donated to Basel Action Network (BAN).

ban
BASEL ACTION
NETWORK

Proudly Supporting Basel Action Network (BAN)

Fighting illegal e-waste dumping and advocating for responsible electronics recycling worldwide.

One flat fee covers everything — no sorting required. Check out our Pricing Section below for details.
TRANSPARENT PRICING

Simple, Fair Pricing

No surprises. One flat fee covers all your electronics — pickup included.

All Electronics Bundle

$25
flat pickup fee

If it plugs in or runs on a battery, we'll take it.

  • Phones, smartphones & iPhones
  • iPads, tablets & e-readers
  • Laptops & MacBooks
  • Desktop computers & towers
  • Monitors & display screens
  • TVs (all sizes)
  • Gaming consoles, controllers & accessories
  • Audio & stereo equipment
  • Speakers, subwoofers & soundbars
  • Cables, cords, adapters & chargers
  • Keyboards, mice & webcams
  • Printers, scanners & fax machines
  • Routers, modems & networking gear
  • Power strips, surge protectors & docks
  • Hard drives, SSDs & computer parts
  • Headphones, earbuds & microphones
  • Cameras, camcorders & lenses
  • Smart home devices (Alexa, Google Home, etc.)
  • Smartwatches & fitness trackers
  • Rechargeable batteries & power banks
  • DVD/Blu-ray players & streaming devices
  • Projectors & presentation equipment
  • Small appliances — toasters, blenders & coffee makers
  • And most other electronics & tech accessories

Payment Options

Cash at Pickup

📱

Cash App

Pay at pickup or in advance via Cash App.

$juetttechrescue
👥

Refer a Friend, Save $5

Know someone with old electronics? Refer them to Juett Tech Rescue and get $5 off your next pickup — up to 3 referrals, saving you up to $15 total.

GET IN TOUCH

Ready to clear out your old tech?

Fill out the form ANYTIME and we'll be in touch shortly to confirm your pickup. Or reach out directly — we're happy to answer any questions!
